description: Defines how carbon inventory measurements are recognized. HIDDEN: measurement recognition is disabled. MANUAL: requires manual review and approval. AUTOMATIC: measurements are automatically recognized and approved.

Defines how subcategory recommendations are retrieved. UNION: returns sector-level recommendations combined with subsector-specific recommendations. SPECIFIC: returns only subsector-specific recommendations.
Number of days of inactivity after which a user is considered inactive. Used to classify users as active or inactive in the admin users screen.
UUID of the File row used as the current Terms & Conditions PDF on the public landing page. Empty when no T&C has been uploaded yet.

Number of years (including the current year) considered as 'recent measurements' for carbon inventories in the organization summary view and admin dashboard KPIs. 1 = only the current year; 2 = current year and the previous one; 3 = current year and the two previous; and so on.
